label: Localized insect bite or sting without systemic reaction
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of localized insect bite or sting reaction.
No anaphylaxis, airway symptoms, systemic reaction, venomous spider/scorpion/snake pathway, tick-borne illness concern, or cellulitis.
exclusion_criteria: Anaphylaxis, airway symptoms, hypotension, syncope, vomiting, or bodywide reaction.
Cellulitis, abscess, necrosis, severe pain, or systemic illness.
Black widow, brown recluse, scorpion, tick-borne illness, snakebite, or specialist-directed allergy plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care or allergy clinic if symptoms persist, worsen, or reactions keep happening.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports insect-bite and sting framing, common local symptoms, home care with washing/cold packs/itch treatment, and emergency escalation for trouble breathing, wheezing, face or mouth swelling, throat tightness, swallowing trouble, weakness, or blue color. Autonomous Phase 1501-1550 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed localized bite or sting reaction without anaphylaxis, airway symptoms, hypotension, systemic reaction, cellulitis, venomous spider/scorpion/snake pathway, tick-borne illness concern, or specialist-directed allergy plan.

condition_terms: localized insect bite no systemic reaction

no systemic reaction, anaphylaxis, or airway symptoms documented
